caption: The video depicts a man standing at a podium, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal or educational setting. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a black vest that has intricate designs. The man is speaking into a microphone, suggesting he is giving a speech or presentation. The audience, seated in front of him, consists of people of various ages, some with long hair and others with shorter hairstyles. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, indicating the event is taking place indoors, possibly in a classroom or conference room. The atmosphere seems attentive and focused, as the audience members are listening intently to the speaker. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, which might indicate the organization or institution hosting the event.
